# SplitFlap

This is a split-flap display engine. Before working on any task:

1. Read STATUS.md for current progress
2. Read ROADMAP.md to understand scope
3. Check relevant docs in /docs
4. Follow coding standards in /.github/instructions/{api,web}.instructions.md
5. Tech stack: Kotlin/Spring Boot (API), React/Vite (Web), Vanilla JS (Embed).
6. CRITICAL: Only implement features in the current phase (see ROADMAP.md).
   Do not implement features from future phases.

DO NOT ADD FEATURES OUTSIDE THE CURRENT PHASE.
